title: Amtech F0978 6 Piece high speed steel (HSS) saw disc set
features: DURABLE: These saw discs have sharp, precision ground teeth and are made from high speed steel
COMPREHENSIVE SET: With a maximum 20,000 RPM, the set is provided with a 3.2mm (1/8") mandrel and includes saw sizes 22mm, 25mm 32mm, 35mm and 44mm
VERSATILE: The blades are suitable for cutting a wide variety of materials including wood, plastic, copper and aluminium
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Legal Disclaimer Use correct safety goggles and gloves/clothing whist using cutting equipment Box Contains 6x Saw discs See more
